Field Identification Key · 23 Species

Waterfowl of Louisiana

Interactive dichotomous key — answer questions step by step to identify any duck, goose, or whistling-duck you encounter

Identify Your Bird

This key guides you through a series of binary choices — each question narrows down the possibilities until you reach a species identification. This guide covers 23 Louisiana ducks, geese, and whistling-ducks — from common species to less-frequent migrants, winter visitors, and specialty species. Each species lists its typical Louisiana season alongside habitat, silhouette, bill shape, and behavior.

Waterfowl numbers and species mix shift dramatically with the seasons — most species here are winter residents, so timing your visit from fall through early spring will yield the most sightings.
🔍 Tap a photo to view it enlarged·👉 Tap a button below to choose your answer and continue
